title: Taxonomy MVP — Line of Business and Topic Assignment
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to assign Line of Business and Topic taxonomy values to each metric using inline dropdowns, so that I can categorize and organize my metrics for easier filtering and discovery.
description:
Introduces the first two taxonomy categories — Line of Business and Topic — that can be assigned to each metric in the Metrics Glossary. The taxonomy table starts empty per tenant; users create values on the fly through an inline dropdown interface inspired by Handsontable's dropdown cell type.

The data model supports tenant-scoped taxonomies (each Salesforce user/account sees only their own values) and is designed to scale to additional objects and custom taxonomies in the future. A relational model links taxonomy values to metrics through a many-to-many relationship.

For the MVP, users cannot create new taxonomy types — only populate values for Line of Business and Topic. Custom taxonomy creation is reserved for a future premium feature. An icon-triggered popup allows adding and editing taxonomy values inline.
acceptance_criteria: User can see Line of Business and Topic columns in the Metrics Glossary data table
User can create new taxonomy values through an inline dropdown or popup interface
Taxonomy values are scoped to the tenant — users only see their own values
User can assign taxonomy values to individual metrics via dropdown selection
Data model supports future addition of custom taxonomy types and additional objects
Taxonomy values persist and are available for filtering and search
ux_changes: Adds Line of Business and Topic dropdown columns to the Metrics Glossary table. An icon-triggered popup allows creating and editing taxonomy values inline. Dropdowns support inline value entry for rapid categorization.
middleware_changes: New service layer for taxonomy CRUD operations — creating taxonomy values, assigning values to metrics, and retrieving tenant-scoped taxonomy data.
data_model_changes: New taxonomy tables: a taxonomy type table, a taxonomy values table scoped by tenant, and a many-to-many junction table linking taxonomy values to metrics. Designed to extend to other object types.
api_changes: New endpoints for taxonomy value CRUD and metric-taxonomy assignment. Endpoints enforce tenant isolation.
implementation_notes: Uses Handsontable dropdown cell type for inline editing. Taxonomy values are stored per-tenant using the Salesforce user/account as the tenant identifier. The relational model follows a WordPress-like taxonomy pattern to support future extensibility to other objects.
comment_summary: Developer clarified the tenant-scoping model (taxonomies per tenant, not per user). Implementation added icon-triggered popup for value creation. Reviewed and approved after adding inline dropdown functionality.
